schedule_note: Every Monday 09:30 China time. GitHub Actions cron uses UTC: 01:30 every Monday.
focus: AI cowork / buddy / AI 同事 / Agentic workspace products, excluding self-product updates unless materially relevant
enterprise AI agents and office workflow agents
coding agents and developer cowork tools
financial, research, data-analysis and productivity workflow agents
China-facing competitors: ByteDance Trae Work/Trae IDE, Alibaba Qoder/DingTalk/Tongyi/Qwen, Kimi Work/Kimi Code/Kimi Claw/Moonshot, Arkclaw/OpenClaw/Manus

queries.name: AI cowork and enterprise agents
queries.query: ("AI cowork" OR "AI buddy" OR "AI coworker" OR "AI colleague" OR "agentic workspace" OR "enterprise agent") product launch update

queries.name: China cowork products
queries.query: ("Trae Work" OR "Trae IDE" OR ByteDance OR 字节 OR 飞书 OR Lark OR DingTalk OR 钉钉) (AI agent OR AI assistant OR cowork OR buddy OR 工作台 OR AI同事)

queries.name: Alibaba and Qoder
queries.query: (Alibaba OR 阿里 OR Qoder OR Qwen OR 通义 OR 钉钉) (AI coding agent OR Claude Code OR AI agent OR cowork OR 工作流)

queries.name: Kimi agent products
queries.query: (Kimi Work OR Kimi Code OR Kimi Claw OR Moonshot OR 月之暗面) (agent OR Agent Swarm OR productivity OR coding OR cowork)

queries.name: developer cowork agents
queries.query: (Claude Code OR Codex OR Cursor OR Qoder OR Trae IDE OR Kimi Code OR coding agent) (enterprise OR product update OR launch OR security)

queries.name: office and collaboration agents
queries.query: (ChatGPT Work OR Claude Cowork OR Microsoft Copilot OR Google Gemini OR Slack AI OR Notion AI) (agent OR workflow OR workspace OR connector)

queries.name: financial and research agents
queries.query: (AI agent OR copilot OR cowork) (finance OR investment OR research OR data analysis OR wealth management) product

official_sources.name: Kimi official
official_sources.notes: Kimi Work / Kimi Code / Kimi Claw product surface; use as capability reference, not weekly news unless dated elsewhere.

official_sources.name: Trae official
official_sources.notes: ByteDance Trae Work and Trae IDE product surface.

official_sources.name: Qoder official
official_sources.notes: QoderWork, QoderWake, Cloud Agents, CLI and changelog links; use for product capability verification.

official_sources.name: OpenAI News
official_sources.notes: Official OpenAI product and model announcements.

official_sources.name: Anthropic News
official_sources.notes: Official Anthropic product, model, and Claude agent announcements.

official_sources.name: Google Workspace Updates
official_sources.notes: Official Google Workspace product updates, including Gemini workflow changes.

official_sources.name: Microsoft 365 Blog
official_sources.notes: Official Microsoft 365 Copilot and workplace AI product updates.

official_sources.name: Slack blog
official_sources.notes: Official Slack AI and workplace agent product posts.

official_sources.name: Kimi Code changelog
official_sources.notes: Official dated Kimi Code updates. Use dated entries within the observation period as weekly product signals.

official_sources.name: Qoder changelog
official_sources.notes: Official dated Qoder product updates. Use dated entries within the observation period as weekly product signals.

official_sources.name: ChatGPT release notes
official_sources.notes: Official dated ChatGPT product release notes. Use only entries within the observation period.

official_sources.name: ChatGPT Agents app in Slack
official_sources.notes: Official help document for Slack agents. Use dated updates when available, otherwise only for positioning.
